ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cipher_suites" (
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cipher suite */,
  "cipher_suite_name" TEXT /* Name of the cipher suite */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the protocol */,
  "encryption_algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the encryption algorithm used */,
  "digest_algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the digest algorithm used */,
  "key_establishment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the key establishment method used */,
  "auth_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the authentication method used */,
  "key_size" INTEGER /* Key size in bits */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cipher suite is deprecated */,
  "security_rating" INTEGER /* Security rating (1-10) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the cipher suite was updated or reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cipher_suites_digest_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("digest_algorithm_id") REFERENCES digest_algorithms ("digest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cipher_suites_auth_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("auth_method_id") REFERENCES auth_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cipher_suites_encryption_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("encryption_algorithm_id") REFERENCES encryption_algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cipher_suites_key_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_establishment_id") REFERENCES key_establishment_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encryption_algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encryption algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the encryption algorithm */,
  "block_size" INTEGER /* Block size of the encryption algorithm in bits */,
  "mode_of_operation" TEXT /* Mode of operation */,
  "key_size_range" TEXT /* Key size range supported */,
  "is_stream_cipher" INTEGER /* Indicates if the algorithm is a stream cipher */,
  "is_block_cipher" INTEGER /* Indicates if the algorithm is a block cipher */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the algorithm was updated or reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "digest_algorithms" (
  "digest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each digest algorithm */,
  "digest_name" TEXT /* Name of the digest algorithm */,
  "output_size" INTEGER /* Output size of the digest in bits */,
  "is_hash_function" INTEGER /* Indicates if the algorithm is a hash function */,
  "is_mac_algorithm" INTEGER /* Indicates if the algorithm is a message authentication code (MAC) algorithm */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the algorithm was updated or reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("digest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cipher_suite_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail record */,
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cipher suite */,
  "encryption_algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the encryption algorithm used */,
  "digest_algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the digest algorithm used */,
  "key_establishment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the key establishment method used */,
  "auth_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the authentication method used */,
  "is_secure" INTEGER /* Indicates if the combination of algorithms is considered secure */,
  "security_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the security of the suite */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the detail record was updated or reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cipher_suite_details_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("suite_id") REFERENCES cipher_suites ("suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cipher_suite_details_encryption_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("encryption_algorithm_id") REFERENCES encryption_algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cipher_suite_details_digest_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("digest_algorithm_id") REFERENCES digest_algorithms ("digest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cipher_suite_details_key_establishment_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_establishment_id") REFERENCES key_establishment_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cipher_suite_details_auth_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("auth_method_id") REFERENCES auth_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_establishment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key establishment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the key establishment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the method was updated or reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auth_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authentication method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the authentication method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the method was updated or reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
